steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “for example” indicates the second clause exemplifies the claim about “many are still well ______”.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content: A colon introduces an elaboration or example, making option B (known:) correct. The others violate independent clause punctuation rules: comma splice (A), missing comma before conjunction (C), and fused sentence (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
